untranslatable_reason: Signal requires qualitative fundamental analysis ('Fundamental analysis confirms strong directional bias', 'supply/demand', 'macro trends', 'event catalysts', 'fundamental thesis invalidated') which cannot be expressed using only the available technical indicators. The source text is also fragmentary and does not provide concrete technical entry/exit specifications. Proxy conditions using ADX and SMA trend confirmation are provided as best-effort substitutes, but do not capture the fundamental analysis requirement.
translation_notes: Signal emphasizes fundamental strength and conviction-based entry with profit-running and loss-acceptance discipline. Since fundamental indicators are not available in the allowed set, substituted with ADX (trend strength) > 25 and price position relative to SMA_50 (directional bias). Entry is sized at 1% risk per trade. Exit uses 2% account loss hard stop per signal parameters. The 1.5x profit extension and 50% partial exit at 1.5x risk cannot be operationalized without explicit profit target levels, which are not specified in the signal.
